Package org.areslib.subsystems.drive

Class DifferentialDriveSubsystem.Config

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.subsystems.drive.DifferentialDriveSubsystem.Config
Enclosing class:
DifferentialDriveSubsystem
public static class DifferentialDriveSubsystem.Config extends Object
Configuration data class for the DifferentialDriveSubsystem.
